single.brief_rationale: The single agent successfully completed all task requirements: it enforced the recall >= 0.85 constraint (achieved 0.88), reported precision/recall/F1 at the chosen threshold, and provided a well-reasoned one-paragraph clinical risk trade-off note. The transcript demonstrates a robust iterative workflow with data exploration, model training, threshold optimization, and refinement, showing clear awareness of class imbalance and validation needs.

multi.brief_rationale: The multi-agent run failed to deliver the required textual outputs due to a runtime timeout error. While the attached artifact images suggest the underlying computation was correct (matching the single agent's threshold), the transcript lacks the mandatory clinical risk trade-off note and the final text summary reporting metrics. Per the reference hint, absence of the trade-off note and threshold-specific metrics in the text output constitutes a failure on compliance.

scores.comparison_notes: The single agent is the clear winner as it fully satisfied the user task constraints, including the critical clinical risk trade-off note and metric reporting, whereas the multi-agent run timed out and omitted the required text deliverables. The single agent also demonstrated superior workflow evidence through iterative code refinement and explicit validation steps visible in the transcript.
